positive: A detailed, symmetrical composition featuring celestial botanicals interwoven with geometric lunar motifs. Centralized composition of stylized glowing moon phases (crescents and full moons) surrounded by sprawling, filigreed foliage that appears to be made of deep sapphire and iridescent emerald leaves. Include subtle stardust trails and constellation lines connecting the elements. The aesthetic should be neo-art deco meets mystic botanicals, rendered in a high-contrast, limited palette of deep indigos, midnight blues, silvers, and pops of ethereal cyan. Use strong, clean silhouettes and flat graphic application suitable for screen printing on fabric. Vector art quality, clean lines, perfect symmetry, maximalist but balanced.
